thought.text: I couldn't find any documentation files that might contain information about the README or where it might be located. Let me check if there's a GitHub repository URL in any other configuration files.

tool_call.name: terminal
tool_call.arguments: {"command": "find /workspace/project -type f | xargs grep -l \"github\" 2>/dev/null", "is_input": "false", "security_risk": "LOW", "summary": "Search for GitHub references in all files"}

summary: Search for GitHub references in all files
